name: The Par Pub
about: The Par Pub is an indoor golf simulator venue located in Largo, Florida. It features high-end launch monitors from Foresight Sports, which use overhead-mounted high-speed cameras to provide precise data on ball speed, spin rate, and carry distance. The facility offers a variety of virtual golf courses, practice capabilities, and a bar environment with TVs, games like darts and Jenga, and a selection of beers, seltzers, wine, and snacks. Pricing is based on an hourly rate per bay, with optional membership packages for additional simulator hours and discounts. The venue caters to golfers of all levels, from serious practice sessions to casual play with friends and family.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium Foresight Sports launch monitor technology providing detailed shot data
Wide selection of world-renowned virtual golf courses
Comprehensive bar and game amenities for a complete entertainment experience
Flexible pricing model with hourly bay rentals and membership options

food_and_drink.notes: No prepared food is served; guests are allowed to cater or bring food into the facility.
Full bar serving beer, seltzers, and wine, with 4 rotating craft beers on tap and domestic offerings available. Outside drinks are not permitted.

simulator_hardware.notes: State-of-the-art launch monitor using high-end overhead mounted high-speed cameras

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: While not explicitly stated on the website, it is standard practice at simulator venues to bring your own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside drinks are not permitted, but guests are allowed to cater or bring food into the facility.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Typically it takes 1 hour to 1 hour 15 minutes per person minimum to complete 18 holes. For example, a foursome, on average, takes about 4 to 5 hours to complete 18 holes.

faq.question: Is The Par Pub kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue describes itself as 'Fun For the Whole Family!' and offers games and activities suitable for various age groups.
